wegui.config.generic.comment.statusBarEn: Show WorldEdit selection and clipboard status on HUD
wegui.config.generic.comment.pastePrevie: Render paste location preview in world after copy
wegui.config.generic.comment.selectionBo: Render wireframe and two corner boxes of current WorldEdit selection
wegui.config.generic.comment.selectionMe: Show "First/Second position set" hints in chat
wegui.config.generic.comment.blockOutlin: Draw an extra wireframe around each block in paste preview
wegui.config.generic.comment.blockVerifi: Litematica-style: compare clipboard vs actual blocks and color by status. Correct=green, Missing=cyan, Wrong Block=red, Wrong State=orange, Extra=magenta
wegui.config.generic.comment.wandItem: Item ID used as WorldEdit selection wand / mod quick-selection tool, default minecraft:wooden_axe
wegui.config.status_bar.comment.statusBa: Anchor point of the status bar on screen
Leave empty to hide; available variables same as above
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.selec: Wireframe color of the selection bounding box
Color of the pos1 corner box
Color of the pos2 corner box
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.block: Color of individual block outlines in paste preview
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.boxSi: Base color of the paste bounding box outline and translucent sides
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.ghost: Transparency of ghost blocks in paste preview (0.0 = invisible, 1.0 = opaque). Only used when Ghost Block Solid is off
Render ghost blocks as solid (Litematica RENDER_BLOCKS_AS_TRANSLUCENT=false). When on, blocks use native opaque render types; when off, use translucent alpha blending
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.boxSi: Transparency of the translucent side faces on the paste bounding box (0.0 = hidden, 1.0 = opaque)
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.schem: Render depth-tested translucent colored sides on each mismatched block (Litematica SCHEMATIC_OVERLAY_ENABLE_SIDES). Unlike Verify Render Sides, these are occluded by world geometry for a grounded look
Transparency of the depth-tested schematic overlay sides (0.0=transparent, 1.0=opaque, default 0.2)
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.ghost: Maximum block distance for rendering ghost blocks and block outlines (chunk-based culling)
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.verif: Outline color when block type and state both match (green)
Outline color when clipboard expects non-air but world is air (cyan)
Outline color when block type differs (red)
Outline color when block type matches but state (facing/half etc.) differs (orange)
Outline color when clipboard expects air but world has a block (magenta)
Whether to render translucent side faces for each mismatched block (Litematica-style, default on)
Transparency of mismatched block side faces (0.0=transparent, 1.0=opaque, default 0.2 Litematica-style)
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.paste: Follow Player: preview follows the player; Fixed: pins the preview at the current position and performs a real WE paste (like a schematic mod placing a schematic). Switch back to Follow Player to resume previewing
wegui.config.paste_preview.comment.rende: One-click switch for render colors and parameters. Default: WeGui original style; Litematica: restores Litematica schematic mod style
wegui.config.mode_indicator.comment.mode: Display current WE tool mode at the bottom-left
Pixel offset from the left of the screen
Pixel offset from the bottom of the screen
Resize the mode indicator as a percentage
wegui.config.command_panel.comment.comma: Show command templates and other descriptions in the command list
Reduce row height to show more commands
Internal use, do not edit manually
Internal use, do not edit manually
Maximum number of recent commands to keep
wegui.config.hotkeys.comment.openGui: Open the WorldEdit command graphical panel
wegui.config.hotkeys.comment.openRadialM: Open the radial menu for favorited commands
wegui.command.title: WorldEdit Command Panel
wegui.radial.title: Favorites
wegui.config.command_panel.comment.radia: Outer radius of the favorites wheel (pixels)
Inner radius of the favorites wheel (pixels)
wegui.picker.title: Select Item
wegui.mode.title: WE Tool Mode
wegui.message.need_edit_mode: [WE GUI] Hold Ctrl and scroll to switch to Edit Selection mode first
wegui.message.no_corner: [WE GUI] Set a corner with left/right click first
wegui.message.corner_not_set: [WE GUI] That corner is not set
wegui.message.need_edit_or_move_mode: [WE GUI] Switch to Edit Selection or Move Paste Position mode first
wegui.message.move_paste_multiplayer_dis: [WE GUI] Move-paste mode is disabled on multiplayer servers
wegui.message.no_clipboard_or_multiplaye: [WE GUI] Cannot move preview: no clipboard or on a multiplayer server
wegui.message.fixed_mode_multiplayer_dis: [WE GUI] Fixed mode is disabled on multiplayer servers
wegui.message.fixed_mode_no_clipboard: [WE GUI] No clipboard available, cannot fix
wegui.message.fixed_mode_enabled: [WE GUI] Preview pinned. Type //paste to place here
